description_long: This guard rail consists of a rectangular frame with five evenly spaced horizontal rails and two vertical posts at each end, all constructed from what appears to be black-coated metal tubing. The horizontal rails are parallel and uniformly spaced, providing a continuous barrier, while the vertical posts extend slightly above and below the top and bottom rails for mounting. The structure is minimalistic and functional, with no decorative elements, and is designed to prevent passage or accidental falls in urban environments such as sidewalks, parking lots, or parks. The ends of the posts appear to be blunt, with no visible flaring or energy-absorbing features. The surface is smooth and likely powder-coated for weather resistance, giving it a sleek, slightly glossy finish. There are no visible reflective markings or additional safety features on the rail.
description: A black metal guard rail with five horizontal rails and two vertical posts, featuring a smooth, powder-coated finish and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the guard rail with all five horizontal rails and both vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the vertical post and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the five horizontal rails and two vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the guard rail with minimal visible detail.
